prompt_text:
### Demographics: 75-year-old Asian woman

### Visit type: Follow-up visit (12-month follow-up)

### Reason for visit / current symptoms
Reason for visit: Routine follow-up (every 3 months) | Diagnosis context: 16 years ago Diagnosed with type 2 diabetes after preoperative labs showed elevated HbA1c
Current symptoms: Occasional fatigue and thirst with nocturia; no DKA/HHS signs; no severe hypoglycemia; Occasional GI side effects (nausea/loose stool)

### History
- Other conditions: Chronic kidney disease Stage 3a (45-59)
Heart failure: HFpEF (NYHA Class II)
MASH
Body mass index category: Obese Class II
Diabetic retinopathy
Diabetic neuropathy
Diabetic Retinopathy
Diabetic Peripheral Neuropathy
Chronic Obstructive Pulmonary Disease
Cholelithiasis (status post cholecystectomy)
- Diabetes-related comorbidities: CKD: Stage 3a (45-59); HF: HFpEF (NYHA Class II); ASCVD (No); MASLD: MASH; BMI Category: Obese Class II
- Family history: Family history of type 2 diabetes not assessed
- Social history: Former smoker (quit 5 years ago; 10 cigarettes/day for 25 years; ~12.5 pack-years); Alcohol 1-2 drinks/week

### Medication information
- Current medications: Metformin 1000mg twice daily; Empagliflozin 10mg once daily; Fluticasone/salmeterol Inhaler (twice daily), Rosuvastatin (10 mg daily), Losartan (50 mg daily), Finerenone (10 mg daily)

### Physical exam (current)
Weight 92.2 kg; Height 165.4 cm; BMI 33.7 kg/m²; Blood pressure 126/73 mmHg

### Laboratory values (with date / relative timing)
Format: YYYY-MM-DD value or relative timing (12 months ago / 9 months ago / 6 months ago / 3 months ago / current)
Order: 12 months ago -> 9 months ago -> 6 months ago -> 3 months ago -> current
- Glycemia: HbA1c (12 months ago 6.6%; 9 months ago 6.5%; 6 months ago 6.0%; 3 months ago 6.2%; current 6.2%), FPG (12 months ago 147mg/dL; 9 months ago 159mg/dL; 6 months ago 140mg/dL; 3 months ago 154mg/dL; current 136mg/dL)
- Anthropometrics / blood pressure: Weight (12 months ago 93.9kg; 9 months ago 93.8kg; 6 months ago 92.1kg; 3 months ago 93.2kg; current 92.2kg), Height (12 months ago 165.4cm; 9 months ago 165.4cm; 6 months ago 165.4cm; 3 months ago 165.4cm; current 165.4cm), BMI (12 months ago 34.0kg/m²; 9 months ago 34.0kg/m²; 6 months ago 34.0kg/m²; 3 months ago 34.0kg/m²; current 33.7kg/m²), SBP (12 months ago 126mmHg; 9 months ago 129mmHg; 6 months ago 126mmHg; 3 months ago 128mmHg; current 126mmHg), DBP (12 months ago 69mmHg; 9 months ago 71mmHg; 6 months ago 71mmHg; 3 months ago 71mmHg; current 73mmHg)
- Liver function: ALT (12 months ago 123U/L; 9 months ago 117U/L; 6 months ago 124U/L; 3 months ago 123U/L; current 114U/L), AST (12 months ago 84U/L; 9 months ago 92U/L; 6 months ago 90U/L; 3 months ago 83U/L; current 83U/L), Total Bilirubin (12 months ago 1.7mg/dL; 9 months ago 1.6mg/dL; 6 months ago 1.6mg/dL; 3 months ago 1.5mg/dL; current 1.5mg/dL)
- Kidney: eGFR (12 months ago 60mL/min/1.73m²; 9 months ago 59mL/min/1.73m²; 6 months ago 57mL/min/1.73m²; 3 months ago 55mL/min/1.73m²; current 57mL/min/1.73m²), UACR (12 months ago 100mg/g; 9 months ago 125mg/g; 6 months ago 87mg/g; 3 months ago 88mg/g; current 95mg/g)
- Lipids: LDL (12 months ago 95mg/dL; 9 months ago 92mg/dL; 6 months ago 92mg/dL; 3 months ago 95mg/dL; current 94mg/dL); HDL (12 months ago 39mg/dL; 9 months ago 37mg/dL; 6 months ago 37mg/dL; 3 months ago 37mg/dL; current 38mg/dL); Triglycerides (12 months ago 167mg/dL; 9 months ago 183mg/dL; 6 months ago 179mg/dL; 3 months ago 163mg/dL; current 173mg/dL)
- Hemoglobin: Hemoglobin (12 months ago 11.0g/dL; 9 months ago 11.8g/dL; 6 months ago 11.1g/dL; 3 months ago 11.8g/dL; current 11.0g/dL)
- Additional tests: urine ketone Not measured (Current); fasting C-peptide Not measured (Current)

### Individualized treatment decision factors
Current adherence and self-management: Moderate adherence (estimated 70-90%); SMBG 1-3 times/week; lifestyle control inconsistent.
Financial context: Patient has standard insurance with moderate copays and a monthly medication budget of ≤ KRW 500,000.
